title: Mission Control
subtitle: AI Operating System
description: Give your AI team a goal. They plan, execute, verify, and ship — autonomously.

empty.title: No Repository Selected
empty.description: Select an analysis from History or analyze a new repository to start a mission. Mission Control binds to the active analysis — just like AI Chat and AI Report.

form.title: Define Your Mission
form.description: Describe what you want your AI team to accomplish. They'll plan, execute, verify, and ship.
form.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Add Google OAuth login with JWT session handling and write tests for the new auth flow
form.noProviders: No enabled providers — workflow will use built-in fallbacks. Add one in Providers.
form.iterationsHint: Each iteration = one observe → think → act → verify → reflect cycle. The Executive may stop earlier if confidence is high.
form.disclaimer: Missions execute locally — your code never leaves your machine.

feed.title: AI Activity Feed
feed.emptyHint: Start a mission to see live agent events stream in here.

worldState.title: World State
worldState.confidenceDesc: The Executive's belief that the chosen path will achieve the mission goal.

descriptions.executive: The Executive orchestrates the mission: it observes state, reasons about next steps, decides which specialist agent or tool to invoke, and verifies the outcome. Confidence and decisions flow from here.
descriptions.planner: Breaks the mission goal into ordered sub-tasks, identifies dependencies, and emits a phased plan that the Executive dispatches.
descriptions.repo-analyst: Clones (if needed) and walks the repository: extracts structure, language stats, frameworks, entry points, and architectural notes.
descriptions.code-reviewer: Reviews diffs and existing code for quality, conventions, complexity, and anti-patterns. Emits severity-tagged issues.
descriptions.bug-fixer: Investigates reported bugs, locates root causes, and applies minimal patches with regression coverage.
descriptions.refactoring: Proposes and applies structural refactors (extract function, rename, move module) while preserving behaviour.
descriptions.documentation: Generates and updates README, API docs, ADRs, and inline JSDoc/TSDoc.
descriptions.test: Writes unit, integration, and e2e tests; runs the suite; surfaces failing cases for the Bug Fixer.
descriptions.security: Audits dependencies and code for vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10), suggests mitigations.
descriptions.performance: Profiles hot paths, identifies bottlenecks, and proposes/validates optimizations.
descriptions.devops: Handles CI/CD pipelines, containerisation, deployment configs, and observability hooks.
descriptions.default: Specialist agent in the CodeInsight AI multi-agent system.

dock.noEvents: No events from this agent yet.

networkGraph.title: Agent Network Graph
networkGraph.ariaLabel: Agent network graph showing 11 agents and their collaboration links

fileTree.title: File Tree
fileTree.emptyHint: Files edited by the AI team will appear here.

fileDiff.selectFileHint: Select a file to view its diff.

bottomPanel.selectFileLeft: Select a file on the left to view its diff.

toasts.describeGoal: Please describe a mission goal first.
toasts.demoStarted: Demo mode started — simulating agent events.
